name: plagiarism-checker-ai-mcp
description: Plagiarism Checker Ai MCP server. Tools: check text similarity, analyze writing style, check citation completeness. Built by MEOK AI Labs.

tools.name: check_text_similarity
tools.description: Compare two texts for similarity using multiple algorithms.

tools.name: analyze_writing_style
tools.description: Detect writing style characteristics and inconsistencies. Optionally compare against a reference text.

tools.name: check_citation_completeness
tools.description: Verify that citations and references are properly formatted and complete. Styles: apa, harvard, ieee, any.

tools.name: generate_originality_report
tools.description: Generate a full originality analysis report. Pass reference_texts as JSON array of strings.
